channel.title: Cyber Case Files — Live Threat Intel
channel.description: Live CVEs, phishing alerts, breach claims, malware/APT spotlights and more.

item.title: Dialogflow CX 'Rogue Agent' Flaw Enabled AI Chatbot Data Theft
item.description: Varonis reported the flaw to Google in late 2025 and it has been addressed, but it reminds defenders to take a fresh look at their AI Infrastructure security.

item.title: Moody Bible Institute
item.description: In June 2026, Moody Bible Institute was targeted by a ShinyHunters "pay or leak" extortion campaign. Over 2.3M unique email addresses and other personal data were later published publicly, including names, physical addresses, phone numbers, dates of birth and other information relating to donors, supporters, students and alumni. In their disclosure notice, Moody advised that they had "engaged both internal and external cybersecurity experts to thoroughly investigate the matter".

item.title: A single RedLine C2 pivots into a maritime spear-phishing cluster and attacker-owned infrastructure.
item.description: An investigation beginning with a single RedLine Stealer C2 server from VMRay UniqueSignal evolved into uncovering a targeted Business Email Compromise campaign against South Korean maritime infrastructure. The analysis started with IP 194.156.79.122 on port 55615, leveraging fingerprinting techniques through FOFA and VirusTotal to identify additional C2 infrastructure. Pivoting through communicating files revealed spear-phishing emails targeting Kangrim Heavy Industries, a major South Korean ma

item.title: When a Proxy Becomes a Spy: Hunting an SSRF That Led Straight Into the Server Room
The 403 That Wasn’t: How I Ended Up Accessing 100K Azure AD Users : My Microsoft Research Story
How a $10 Fee Can Lock Thousands of Dollars Forever
item.description: Somewhere inside millions of lines of code that move real money between blockchains, one sequence of four simple steps — written by…Continue reading on Medium »

item.title: CVE-2026-9836
item.description: IBM InfoSphere Information Server 11.7.0.0 through 11.7.1.6 is affected by an information disclosure vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-11712
item.description: IBM WebSphere Application Server 9.0, and 8.5 is affected by a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the administrative console help system.

item.title: CVE-2026-12085
item.description: IBM UCD - IBM UrbanCode Deploy 7.3 through 7.3.2.18 and IBM UCD - IBM DevOps Deploy 8.0 through 8.0.1.13, 8.1 through 8.1.2.6, and 8.2 through 8.2.1.0 IBM DevOps Deploy could disclose sensitive configurations and secrets to authenticated users in API responses that could be used in further attacks against the system.
